mapper.sql: id, model, serial_number, manufacturer, purchase_date, status, ai_properties, deleted, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM drone WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM drone WHERE deleted = 0
AND model LIKE CONCAT('%', #{model}, '%')
AND model LIKE '%' || #{model} || '%'
AND serial_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{serialNumber}, '%')
AND serial_number LIKE '%' || #{serialNumber} || '%'
AND status = #{status}
AND purchase_date >= #{purchaseDateStart}
AND purchase_date <= #{purchaseDateEnd}
ORDER BY create_time ASC
ORDER BY create_time DESC
ORDER BY purchase_date ASC
ORDER BY purchase_date DESC
ORDER BY create_time DESC
LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE drone SET model = #{model}, serial_number = #{serialNumber}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, purchase_date = #{purchaseDate,typeHandler=com.uav.management.typehandler.DateTypeHandler}, status = #{status}, ai_properties = #{aiProperties}, update_time = #{updateTime,typeHandler=com.uav.management.typehandler.DateTypeHandler}, update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE drone SET deleted = 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
